title: Fix config-persistence test — ENOENT on atomic rename
description: test/config-persistence.test.js fails: ENOENT on rename in _writeToDisk (src/config.js:325). Error: 'no such file or directory, rename config.json.tmp -> config.json'. The atomic write pattern (mkdir → writeFile tmp → rename) fails because the ~/.agentic-service/ directory may not exist when the test runs. Either the test needs to ensure the directory exists in beforeEach, or _writeToDisk needs to verify the directory was created before writing. This is the only failing test (1/972). Error log from latest-test.log.
